title: Herbold et al. (2023) aligned essay rubric

criteria.definition_en: How well the essay addresses the assigned topic and develops a sufficiently complete response.
How coherent the argument is, including structure, paragraphing, and overall flow.
How clearly and effectively ideas are expressed and how easy the essay is to understand.
How well the writer controls grammar, syntax, and general language use.
How sophisticated the thinking and language are, including sentence variation and argumentative depth.
How rich and appropriate the vocabulary is and how well the text uses linking expressions and cohesion.
How effectively the essay uses sentence patterns and grammatical constructions.
